web.admin.domains.verify.confirmDescript.text: Run DNS and SSL verification checks for {domain}.

web.admin.domains.verify.success.resolvi.text: {domain} is resolving but not yet verified.

web.admin.domains.verify.success.pending.text: {domain} is pending — DNS is not resolving yet.

web.admin.domains.attach.rosterError.text: Could not load this organization's domains.

web.admin.domains.attach.noDomains.text: No domains attached to this organization yet.

web.admin.domains.addDomain.strategy.app.text: Approximated — DNS ownership check, no proxying.

web.admin.domains.addDomain.strategy.pas.text: Passthrough — you point DNS at this deployment's proxy.

web.admin.domains.addDomain.strategy.ext.text: External — DNS is managed outside this deployment.

web.admin.domains.addDomain.strategy.cad.text: Caddy on-demand — certificates issued automatically on first request.
Caddy — certificates issued automatically on first request.

web.admin.domains.dns.txtStep.text: 1. Add a TXT record to prove ownership.

web.admin.domains.dns.aStep.text: 2. Add an A record pointing the apex at the proxy.

web.admin.domains.dns.cnameStep.text: 2. Add a CNAME record pointing the subdomain at the proxy.

web.admin.domains.dns.propagationNote.text: DNS changes can take a few minutes to propagate before verification succeeds.

web.admin.domains.orgPicker.searchPlaceh.text: Object ID, external ID, or email

web.admin.domains.orgPicker.searchHint.text: Search by objid, extid, or a member's email address.

web.admin.domains.orgPicker.parseError.text: The organization results could not be read.

web.admin.domains.orgPicker.idle.text: Enter a value above to search.
